items.title: Home Depot acquires building material distributor GMS in $5.5 billion deal
items.description: Home Depot has acquired GMS Inc., a building material distributor, as it continues to push for business from professional contractors.

items.title: Dow Jones Futures: Market Wavers At Highs, Apple iPhone Event Due; Nvidia, Tesla, AppLovin, Robinhood In Focus
items.description: Dow Jones futures: The stock market had a mixed week but is right at highs. The Apple iPhone event looms. Nvidia, Tesla, AppLovin are in focus.
